sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Cursor is at position 4 (pink_4). Let me cycle it to find a match.
# I'll try UP repeatedly until pink_4 matches a top pattern.

def extract_5x5(lines, r, c):
    return tuple(tuple(lines[r+dr][c+dc] for dc in range(5)) for dr in range(5))

def normalize(pat):
    return tuple(tuple(1 if cell == 'B' else 0 for cell in row) for row in pat)

top_blocks = [
    (4, 12, 'S'), (4, 22, 'P'), (4, 35, 'S'), (4, 45, 'P'),
    (13, 12, 'S'), (13, 22, 'P'), (13, 35, 'S'), (13, 45, 'P'),
    (22, 12, 'S'), (22, 22, 'P'), (22, 35, 'S'), (22, 45, 'P')
]

top_patterns = []
for r, c, color in top_blocks:
    inner = extract_5x5(current_frame.ascii.split('\n'), r+1, c+1)
    top_patterns.append({'color': color, 'normalized': normalize(inner)})

# Cycle pink_4 (cursor is already at col=43, position 4)
print("Cycling pink_4...")
for i in range(10):
    action(['UP'])
    cur = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    pat = extract_5x5(cur, 52, 43)
    norm = normalize(pat)
    matches = [j for j, tp in enumerate(top_patterns) if tp['normalized'] == norm and tp['color'] == 'P']
    print(f"  After {i+1} UPs: matches={matches}")
    if matches:
        print(f"  Found match! Stopping.")
        break

# Now move to pink_3 (position 3)
print("\nMoving to pink_3...")
action(['LEFT'])

# Cycle pink_3
print("Cycling pink_3...")
for i in range(10):
    action(['UP'])
    cur = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    pat = extract_5x5(cur, 52, 36)
    norm = normalize(pat)
    matches = [j for j, tp in enumerate(top_patterns) if tp['normalized'] == norm and tp['color'] == 'P']
    print(f"  After {i+1} UPs: matches={matches}")
    if matches:
        print(f"  Found match! Stopping.")
        break

# Move to pink_1 (position 1)
print("\nMoving to pink_1...")
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT'])

# Cycle pink_1
print("Cycling pink_1...")
for i in range(10):
    action(['UP'])
    cur = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    pat = extract_5x5(cur, 52, 22)
    norm = normalize(pat)
    matches = [j for j, tp in enumerate(top_patterns) if tp['normalized'] == norm and tp['color'] == 'P']
    print(f"  After {i+1} UPs: matches={matches}")
    if matches:
        print(f"  Found match! Stopping.")
        break

# Check all pink symbols
print("\n=== Final check ===")
cur = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i, c in enumerate([15, 22, 29, 36, 43]):
    pat = extract_5x5(cur, 52, c)
    norm = normalize(pat)
    matches = [j for j, tp in enumerate(top_patterns) if tp['normalized'] == norm and tp['color'] == 'P']
    print(f"  pink_{i}: matches={matches}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
